note: CoW Protocol on-chain order cancellation. GPv2Settlement.invalidateOrder(bytes orderUid), selector 0x15337bc0, mainnet 0x9008d19f58aabd9ed0d60971565aa8510560ab41. Owner-checked (the orderUid encodes owner; only the order owner can invalidate). -> amm cancel_intent_order (venue=cow_swap). order_hash carries the full CoW orderUid (56B: 32B orderDigest + 20B owner + 4B validTo); cancel semantics are terms-free so the opaque uid suffices for an audit-level cancel action. 1st-party: github.com/cowprotocol/contracts src/contracts/GPv2Settlement.sol.
